ksa_text: Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.

top_anchors.element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.409) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Engineering. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Engineering roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI/ML Engineering is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Engineering. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Engineering competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.409) and edge-domain placement (AI/ML Engineering) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Engineering. All passes support exclusion.
